parent_issue: POL-97 — ANALYZE: Polaris 1.0 CLI/operator surface for finalize and Codex plugin
affected_flows: public CLI entrypoint dispatch and help handling
loop status and loop continue command factories
finalize command factory and 12-step delivery orchestration
map command factory availability through public CLI

assessment.architecture_recommendation: Migrate the public CLI entrypoint to Commander and register existing subsystem command factories. This matches src/cli/POLARIS.md and existing src/loop, src/map, and src/finalize factories.
assessment.codex_recommendation: Codex should expose read-only status and dry-run preview without approval; confirmed continuation can remain approval-envelope gated; finalize must remain operator-only until a dedicated confirmed finalize tool exists.
evidence: src/cli/POLARIS.md says Commander and addCommand are canonical, but src/cli/index.ts is switch-based and omits map/finalize/resume/abort/version help.
src/finalize/index.ts exports createFinalizeCommand and runFinalize but public CLI does not register finalize.
src/loop/index.ts and src/map/index.ts already provide Commander command factories that the CLI can register.
node dist/cli/index.js --help and node dist/cli/index.js finalize --help exit 1 with Unknown command.
src/mcp/tools exposes status, dry-run, and confirmed continuation; Codex plugin helper still maps directly to mutating polaris loop continue and polaris run.

child_issues: POL-98 — IMPLEMENT: Wire Polaris public CLI through Commander and expose finalize
POL-99 — IMPLEMENT: Normalize Polaris CLI help, errors, and operator safety text
POL-100 — IMPLEMENT: Align Codex plugin commands with Polaris safety boundaries
POL-101 — IMPLEMENT: Run Polaris 1.0 operator smoke test on a tiny real issue
notes: run-start telemetry was written after Linear fetch because the tool call happened before local telemetry setup; recorded rather than backfilled out of order
repo-analysis provider is not configured because polaris.config.json is absent
